prevalence.source: WHO Europe + IHME GBD (alcohol use) context
prevalence.trend: stable; high-risk drinking persists in some regions

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 AUD criteria; assessment includes withdrawal risk and medical comorbidity

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: moderate; brief interventions used in many primary care settings
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on access to addiction services and psychosocial support

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care screening and referral pathways common in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Brief interventions, structured addiction treatment, relapse-prevention medications where indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability and persistent alcohol-related harms in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong public health monitoring and established addiction medicine services in many member states
